prompt: A full-body anime illustration of a cute gothic lolita girl seated at a small round table in a pastel goth tea-room, facing the viewer with a confident mischievous smile. She has ash taupe brown hair in twin tails tied with 2 black flower ribbons, soft bangs, pink-magenta eyes, and a tiny black bat hair clip. Her pose is relaxed and flirty: one elbow on the tabletop, one cheek resting on her hand, the other hand raised toward the viewer holding a black playing card with a large pink heart and 4 small pink crosses. She wears a black long-sleeved sailor-style dress with a white collar, oversized pink bow at the chest, heart-shaped pendant at the bow center, pleated skirt, black choker with a silver cross charm, layered silver necklaces, black thigh-high stockings, heart-ring garter straps on both thighs, and chunky black platform Mary Jane shoes with multiple straps, silver buckles, heart details, and cross accents. Add small cute earrings and delicate gothic accessories. The room uses a limited black and pastel pink palette with soft lavender-gray striped wallpaper. Include 2 black curtain drapes with pink scalloped trim at the upper left and upper right corners, 1 black cross wall ornament, 1 black bat wall ornament, and 2 pink heart wall ornaments. On the left shelving, show exactly 2 teaware pieces: 1 white teapot with a pink heart and 1 white teacup with a pink heart. The girl sits on a black chair with a pink backrest shaped like a heart silhouette. In front of her is 1 small round black table with a pink top. On the tabletop, depict a cute board game in progress: 1 rectangular board with alternating light and dark spaces, 4 player pawns total with 2 pink and 2 dark navy, 3 visible single cards near the board, and 3 separate card stacks on the right side of the table. Add 1 pink jelly dessert on a pedestal plate near the back right of the table. The floor is a large black-and-pink checkerboard. Style should be polished modern anime, crisp line art, soft cel shading, glossy eyes, delicate fabric folds, clean composition, charming pastel goth atmosphere, highly detailed accessories, vertical portrait framing, full body visible, centered character, whimsical and stylish.
